title: DEI statements and policies; clarify that student activity fees paid by students are not state funds.
summary: An Act To Amend Section 37-191-3, Mississippi Code Of 1972, To Clarify That Student Activity Fees Paid By Students Are Not Considered State Funds; To Amend Section 37-191-9, Mississippi Code Of 1972, To Make Technical Nonsubstantive Amendments; To Bring Forward Sections 37-191-1, 37-191-5, 37-191-7, 37-191-11, 37-191-13, 37-191-15, And 37-191-17, Mississippi Code Of 1972, For Purposes Of Possible Amendment; And For Related Purposes.
